sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94503" key="ska/leuqron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκᾰ´λ-ευθρον</orth> (<sense id="n94503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-εθρον</ref> </xr>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, later form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπάλαθρον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
